tasks.label: iOS: XcodeGen generate
args: This task requires macOS + Xcode (run it via VS Code Remote SSH to a Mac).

tasks.label: iOS: Build (Simulator)
args: This task requires macOS + Xcode (run it via VS Code Remote SSH to a Mac).
cd ios && xcodebuild -project TripPlanner.xcodeproj -scheme TripPlanner -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
